description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the gradle:alpine Docker image and sets GRADLE_OPTS variable to -Dorg.gradle.daemon=false. Add a before_script that exports GRADLE_USER_HOME to the .gradle directory in the project. Define two stages: build and test. In the build stage add a build job that uses a cache keyed by $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME with paths build and .gradle, policy push, and runs the command 'gradle --build-cache assemble'. In the test stage add a test job that uses the same cache key with policy pull, same paths, and runs 'gradle run'.
